messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return compact_key_value_v1 only: exactly one key=value line for each required key, in order.
No JSON, no braces, no quotes, no markdown fences, no prose outside the key=value lines.
Use | for cited_evidence, open_blockers, and critical_features_preserved list values.
Keep values short. Keep final_answer 25-80 words.

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

structured_canonical_state.USER_GOAL: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
SETTLED_DECISIONS: Gov chooses control actions, not models.
Workers return compact key=value lines only.
structured_canonical_state.system_role: HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.

turns_completed.output_summary: Gov local verdict ALLOW route CONTINUE_WORKER
blocked_moves: Do not drop source IDs, action boundary, timing/scope/authority/dependency checks, or critical terms.

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
blocked_moves_so_far: Do not drop source IDs, action boundary, timing/scope/authority/dependency checks, or critical terms.
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.

rules: Return exactly one key=value line for each required key.
No JSON, no braces, no quotes, no markdown, no prose outside the lines.
Use | to separate list items. Use an empty value when no blockers exist.

field_bounds.controlling_source_fact: one exact source doc_id or short source-bound fact
field_bounds.cited_evidence: pipe-separated exact source doc_id values, max 8

source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone.

context.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone.
context.anomaly_observed: block the action because the request contains urgency, name variation, exception wording, or fraud-like noise
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the frozen AP source records close the exact action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Request context for CASE-D114F7F3C309: an operator asks whether to proceed with invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone. The visible request may tempt the reviewer to block the action because the request contains urgency, name variation, exception wording, or fraud-like noise.

Current control record for this request confirms that three-way match plus approver limit is current, exact, and tied to the requested action. The record matches the actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary for invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone.

Operational note: the request looks risky, but current exact source records can still close the action boundary. Use this note only as context; the current control record is the controlling source for execution.

Communication boundary: email request cannot release payment unless source payment packet closes authority. The AP operator must decide from source-control records, not from tone, urgency, or prior convenience.

policy_documents.title: Frozen AP source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Policy rule for payment system: execution may proceed only when the current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.
